name: QuadroCoop
description: 4-player local co-op for Geometry Dash platformer mode. Supports P1-P4 with independent keybinds, trigger cloning, dual portal logic, and an in-game settings menu.

enable-p3.name: Enable Player 3
enable-p3.description: Spawn and drive P3 (Red — binds J/I/L) in platformer levels.

enable-p4.name: Enable Player 4
enable-p4.description: Spawn and drive P4 (Green — binds F/T/H) in platformer levels.
